meta.title: Lucas Stolpe - Data Engineer & BI Analyst
meta.description: Portfolio of Lucas Henrique Stolpe: ETL pipeline architecture, dbt, Airflow, Power BI, and data automation.

hero.description: I turn raw data into reliable pipelines and better decisions - from Python extraction and web scraping to dbt modeling, Airflow orchestration, and dashboards people actually use.

about.heading: Data with context, teams with direction
paragraphs: I am a Data Engineer and BI Analyst, with previous experience in team leadership and technology project coordination. I enjoy solving problems end-to-end - from extraction and modeling to dashboards people actually open every morning.
Today I work with ETL pipeline architecture, Airflow orchestration, dbt modeling, and automation with n8n and Python - always focused on trustworthy, documented, and auditable data.

sectionHead.heading: Skills
sectionHead.subheading: From ingestion to visualization - technologies I use to turn data into decisions.

sectionHead.heading: Professional experience
sectionHead.subheading: A timeline - from technical support to project coordination and data engineering.

bullets: Data infrastructure: dbt and Airflow implementation, pipeline development, and API integrations
Process automation using specialized solutions
Collaboration with multidisciplinary teams in data, technology, and operations
Support for dashboard development, user management, and automations
Requirements gathering and KPI definition with business teams
Development of interactive dashboards in Power BI
Data analysis to support strategic decision making
Ensuring consistency and quality of reported information
Planning and building dashboards for decision support
Cloud function implementations with AWS Lambda and Google Cloud Run Jobs
Support in creating and maintaining dbt models
Automated data collection through web scraping
Team coordination in software and automation projects
System development with React, TypeScript, C#, and Python
Strategic dashboard and report development in Power BI
Spatial data management with PostgreSQL + PostGIS
Development and maintenance of C# (.NET Core) applications
Development of interactive dashboards with Power BI and SQL Server
Team collaboration using SourceTree and Git
Creation of advanced C# methods and frontend development
Support in system maintenance and SQL Server usage
Technical support and customer service for ERP systems
Internal process automation with up to 80% execution time reduction
Maintenance of internal control systems
Web development with HTML, CSS, JS, and PHP

sectionHead.heading: What I built on my own
sectionHead.subheading: Personal projects that solve real problems from end to end.

items.name: Real Estate Data Pipeline
items.subtitle: Collection, modeling, and analytics
items.description: Pipeline for collecting, cleaning, modeling (SCD2), orchestrating, and documenting Zap Imoveis data - asynchronous scraping integrated directly with dbt and Airflow.

items.name: Power BI AutoDoc
items.subtitle: Automated documentation for Power BI models
items.description: Automatically generates Markdown documentation for Power BI projects - tables, measures, RLS, and relationships - with a Streamlit interface integrated with Obsidian.

items.name: AI Support Agent
items.subtitle: Intelligent support automation
items.description: WhatsApp support with conversational AI for initial triage. The Streamlit panel is used for audit only: tickets are automatically created in GLPI with AI-generated titles and descriptions based on the conversation.

sectionHead.heading: Public repositories
sectionHead.subheading: Directly from the GitHub API - always up to date, no middle layer.
